member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.Soundbank.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates a Soundbank object from bytes.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.Soundbank.Size
member.summary: Size of the bank in bytes

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.Soundbank.ModId
member.summary: The id of the mod that this soundbank is from

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.Soundbank.InternalPath
member.summary: The path of the soundbank relative to its mods soundbank folder (using / as a separator)

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.SoundbankManager.LoadSoundbank(System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.Soundbank@)
member.param: The id of the mod that this sound bank is for
The internal path of the Soundbank relative to the mods soundbanks folder (using / as a separator)
member.returns: Whether the Soundbank was loaded successfully.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.SoundbankManager.GetSoundbank(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a Soundbank by its internal path.
member.param: The mod that the soundbank is stored in
The internal path of the Soundbank relative to the mods soundbanks folder (using / as a separator)

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.SoundbankManager.TryGetSoundbank(System.String,System.String,SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.Soundbank@)
member.summary: Tries to get a Soundbank by its internal path.
member.param: The mod that the soundbank is stored in
The internal path of the Soundbank relative to the mods soundbanks folder (using / as a separator)

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.Sound.API.SoundbankManager.LoadedSoundbanks
member.summary: Lookup table that saves all loaded soundbanks. Key is the asset mod id and internal path.
